Open Source · Self-hosted · English Mirror

OpenClaw
Agent
CN Community

Open-source, self-hosted AI agent that gets smarter the longer you use it.
Runs on your laptop, VPS or Docker host,
remembers Memorylessons, distills Skillsknow-how,
and stays in touch via Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp and more.

Linux / macOS / WSL2
curl -fsSL https://openclawal.cn/scripts/install.sh | bash
Windows install
irm https://openclawal.cn/scripts/install.ps1 | iex
Read the docsGitHub
Overview

What is OpenClaw?

Overview

Open-source, self-hosted AI agent

OpenClaw runs on your laptop, VPS, Docker, SSH or cloud dev environment. It is not tied to a single IDE and never locks your workflow inside a web chat box.

See install optionsOverview

Long-term memory and Skills

It remembers your projects, preferences and work patterns across sessions, and distills solved problems into reusable Skills you can compose later.

See the memory systemOverview

MCP, tools and automation

Supports MCP, terminal, files, browser, image, TTS and more, with cron scheduling for briefings, backups, sweeps and reminders.

See automationOverview

Multi-platform messaging gateway

Stay in touch via Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Signal, Email and many more — your agent is always reachable.

See integrationsOverview

Made for long-running tasks

Designed for jobs that span days, weeks and months — not just one chat. Sessions, profiles, checkpoints and rollbacks are first-class concepts.

Get startedOverview

Bring your own model

Works with Claude, GPT, Gemini, Qwen, GLM, Kimi, MiniMax, OpenAI-compatible endpoints and local models. Pick whatever fits your network and workflow.

See model configuration
Get Started

Deploy OpenClaw in 60 seconds

1

Install

Linux / macOS / WSL2
curl -fsSL https://openclaw.ai/install.sh | bash
Windows PowerShell
irm https://openclaw.ai/install.ps1 | iex
  • Unix-like: Linux, macOS and WSL2 users can run the first command directly. Windows users can use the PowerShell command; native Windows installation is now supported.
  • Windows: If you install on native PowerShell, do not run the bash command above — copy the second PowerShell command instead.

Full troubleshooting guide: see the install docs

2

Configure a model

Command
openclaw setup
openclaw model
Use the CLI configurator to connect to Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi, GLM, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
3

Start chatting

Command
openclaw
Launch the full TUI with multi-line input, command completion, context compression, tool-output streams and session history.
4

Connect a messaging gateway

Command
openclaw gateway setup
openclaw gateway
Bring OpenClaw into Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Signal, Email and more.
See It In Action

MCPs, Skills and tools out of the box

OpenClaw TerminalLive Demo
Autonomous Agent

Any device, any model.

Supported messaging platforms+
TelegramDiscordSlackWhatsAppSignalEmailMattermostMatrixWeChat
Supported models & providers+
ClaudeGPTGeminiQwenGLMKimiMiniMaxLocalOpenRouter
OpenClaw
FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Question

What is OpenClaw?

OpenClaw is an open-source, self-hosted AI agent with long-term memory and Skills. It runs in your terminal for complex tasks, and stays online through messaging gateways like Telegram, Discord and Slack.

Quickstart ↗
Question

How is it different from an IDE AI assistant?

IDE assistants are great at instant collaboration inside the current window. OpenClaw emphasises long-term context, cross-session memory, reusable Skills, MCP integrations and multi-platform automation — built for jobs that keep running.

See long-term memory ↗
Question

Where should I start?

Start with the install guide and the Quickstart. From there, configure a model, then add tools and a messaging gateway as your workflow grows.

See install guide ↗
Features

A personal agent system for long-running work

OpenClaw

Gets smarter over time

Through long-term memory, session search, skill distillation and user profiles, OpenClaw turns each task into reusable expertise.

See the memory systemOpenClaw

Beyond the IDE

Run it on a VPS, Docker, SSH, Modal, Daytona or local box — and talk to it through Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Signal, Email and CLI.

See integrationsOpenClaw

Natural-language automation

Built-in cron scheduling: briefings, backups, sweeps, scrapes and reminders — all configurable in plain English and delivered to the platforms you live in.

See the automation guideOpenClaw

Skill system

Distill complex tasks into reusable skills, compatible with the agentskills.io open format. Great for teams and community contribution.

See skillsOpenClaw

Tools & sandbox

40+ built-in tools, toolset profiles, command approval, container isolation, browser control, vision, image generation, TTS and multi-model inference.

See the tool referenceOpenClaw

Research- and training-friendly

Bulk trajectory generation, compression, Atropos RL environments and data workflows for next-generation tool-calling models.

See RL training
